decks.notes: This deck focuses on playing aggressive creatures while disrupting the opponent's game plan with disruptive spells like Thoughtseize and Fatal Push. The creatures in this deck have abilities that can provide additional value, such as Flickerwisp's ability to temporarily remove a permanent from the battlefield or Quantum Riddler's ability to manipulate the opponent's deck. The deck aims to apply pressure early on while disrupting the opponent's strategy to gain the upper hand in the match.

The deck focuses on utilizing aggressive creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd to pressure opponents while disrupting their strategy with cards like Teferi, Time Raveler and Prismatic Ending. It also aims to control the board with removal spells like Solitude and Wrath of the Skies. The inclusion of Consign to Memory and Quantum Riddler helps with card advantage and manipulation, while Fable of the Mirror-Breaker adds a combo potential. The deck's mana base allows for flexibility in casting spells of different colors.

This deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's game plan while applying pressure with efficient threats. By utilizing cards like Ephemerate and Flickerwisp to repeatedly exile and return key creatures, the deck can control the board and maintain tempo. Liliana, the Last Hope provides additional value and disruption, while cards like Fatal Push and Solitude help deal with opposing threats efficiently. With a mix of aggressive creatures and disruptive spells, this Death and Taxes deck aims to keep the opponent off balance and secure victory through attrition and resource denial.

This deck focuses on utilizing a combination of aggressive creatures and disruptive spells to disrupt your opponent's strategies while steadily building your own board presence. By combining creatures such as Emperor of Bones and Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd with removal spells like Fatal Push and Solitude, you aim to quickly overwhelm your opponent. Additionally, cards like Thoughtseize and Teferi, Time Raveler help to disrupt your opponent's game plan, giving you the edge in the match. With a mix of aggro and control elements, this deck aims to control the game and secure a swift victory.

This deck focuses on quickly applying pressure to the opponent with a mix of powerful creatures and efficient removal spells. By utilizing a combination of low-cost creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Territorial Kavu, along with versatile cards like Lightning Bolt and Stubborn Denial, the deck aims to control the board and deal damage quickly. Additionally, the inclusion of Leyline Binding and Leyline of the Guildpact allows for additional disruption against opposing strategies. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with early aggression and efficient removal spells.

This deck focuses on aggressive creatures to apply pressure on the opponent while disrupting their game plan with a combination of removal and disruptive spells. It includes a mix of powerful creatures like Phelia and Ragavan, backed up by efficient removal spells like Prismatic Ending and Galvanic Discharge. The deck aims to quickly establish board presence and disrupt the opponent's strategy, ultimately overwhelming them before they can execute their own game plan. It also includes a small toolbox of powerful spells like Wrath of the Skies and Consign to Memory to maintain control of the game.

This deck focuses on ramping up Eldrazi creatures using cards like Through the Breach and Eldrazi Temple to quickly overwhelm the opponent. It also includes control elements like Counterspells and removal spells to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The goal is to quickly get big Eldrazi creatures onto the battlefield while controlling the opponent's board and hand, ensuring victory through powerful threats and disruptive spells. This deck combines the power of Eldrazi creatures with control elements to create a versatile and powerful strategy in the Modern format.

This deck focuses on assembling the powerful UrzaTron land combination to generate a large amount of mana quickly. It aims to control the game through counterspells, removal, and powerful threats like Karn, Thought-Knot Seer, and Ugin. The deck also includes graveyard hate in Relic of Progenitus and can tutor for specific pieces with Expedition Map. By efficiently ramping up and disrupting the opponent's game plan, this deck seeks to dominate the late game with massive Eldrazi creatures like Ulamog and close out the game.

The main concept of this deck is to aggressively use cards like Burning Inquiry, Faithless Looting, and Goblin Lore to quickly fill up your graveyard with creatures, especially Hollow Ones and Detective's Phoenix, to put pressure on your opponent early in the game. By utilizing cards like Marauding Mako, Orcish Bowmasters, and Nethergoyf to further push damage, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and powerful aggro strategy. Additionally, cards like Lightning Bolt and Unholy Heat provide removal options to control the board and maintain tempo.

The deck focuses on aggressive play, utilizing low-cost spells like Lightning Bolt and Lava Dart to quickly chip away at the opponent's life total. The goal is to maintain pressure with creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Slickshot Show-Off while also disrupting the opponent's game plan with cards like Surgical Extraction. With a mix of burn spells, cheap creatures, and card selection, the deck aims to close out the game before the opponent can stabilize.

The deck revolves around quickly summoning powerful creatures such as Allosaurus Rider and Ghalta, Stampede Tyrant by using cards like Neoform and Eldritch Evolution. By utilizing cards like Nourishing Shoal and Planar Genesis, the deck aims to gain tempo and overwhelm the opponent with a high amount of creature power. The inclusion of cards like Pact of Negation and Veil of Summer helps protect the combo pieces and ensure the deck can execute its game plan smoothly. Overall, the deck aims to establish a strong board presence and win the game through a well-executed combo.

The deck focuses on utilizing artifacts to quickly develop a board presence while controlling the opponent's plays with counterspells and removal. Emry, Lurker of the Loch serves as a valuable recursion engine for artifacts, with Mox Opal providing additional mana acceleration. Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Quantum Riddler offer card advantage and selection. Unholy Heat and Metallic Rebuke help maintain control over the battlefield, while Urza's Saga allows for searching for key artifacts to further enhance the aggro strategy. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of efficient threats and disruption.

The deck focuses on assembling a variety of creatures with different abilities to create a synergistic toolbox that can respond to different situations. By using cards like Green Sun's Zenith and Malevolent Rumble, the deck can quickly find and deploy key creatures like Young Wolf, Yawgmoth, Thran Physician, and Grist, the Hunger Tide. Agatha's Soul Cauldron and Dredger's Insight provide value and card advantage, while cards like Ignoble Hierarch and Formidable Speaker help ramp up mana production. Overall, the deck aims to control the board and overwhelm opponents with versatile creature combinations.

This deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana with Birthing Ritual to bring out powerful creatures like Coiling Oracle and Ice-Fang Coatl. It utilizes Flare of Denial and Force of Negation to counter opponent's threats while maintaining board presence. The inclusion of Subtlety and Endurance allows for disruption and protection against various strategies. The deck also features a mix of control elements like Sink into Stupor and removal spells like Dismember. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents with early threats and efficient plays while maintaining control of the game.

The deck focuses on utilizing artifacts to quickly generate mana and control the board, while also disrupting the opponent's strategy. By combining cards like Engineered Explosives, Metallic Rebuke, and Tormod's Crypt with artifact creatures like Arcbound Ravager and Emry, Lurker of the Loch, the deck aims to apply early pressure and maintain a versatile toolkit for different matchups. Urza's Saga provides additional tutoring and resource generation, while Mishra's Bauble and Mox Opal enable explosive starts. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggression and disruption.

This deck focuses on utilizing powerful creatures and burn spells to quickly bring down the opponent's life total. By combining aggressive creatures like Nethergoyf and Cori-Steel Cutter with efficient removal like Lightning Bolt and Unholy Heat, the deck aims to apply constant pressure and finish off the game before the opponent can stabilize. The inclusion of cards like Mishra's Bauble and Dreadhorde Arcanist provide card advantage and allow for additional flexibility in the deck's game plan. Overall, the deck prioritizes speed and aggression to secure victories.
